title: valantia persica
intro: Valantia persica, also known as Garden Valerian, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. The medicinal properties of Valantia persica include its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, due to the presence of valerenic acid and valepotriates. The plant is known for its numerous health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. Valantia persica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
